data.title: Flying Eyes Optics ranks among Top 15 highest momentum raises on StartEngine in first week, with a Regulation Crowdfunding offering.
data.description: Today, Summer Hawk Optics, Inc., operating as Flying Eyes Optics in Austin, Texas, disclosed that its Regulation Crowdfunding (Reg CF) campaign on StartEngine has achieved a position in the Top 15 highest momentum fundraisers on the platform in its initial week. The success of the campaign highlights the strong support and interest, as demonstrated by the rapid progress and engagement from investors.

data.title: Real estate expert Deb Paton-Showley highlights the importance of using a local realtor for lake properties.
data.description: In Warsaw, Indiana on February 20, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation explores the distinct factors involved in purchasing a lake house compared to buying a house in a town. The process, as highlighted by Deb Paton-Showley from Coldwell Banker Real Estate Group, goes beyond just seeking a property with a scenic view. The article delves into the intricacies of this type of real estate transaction, shedding light on the unique considerations and steps buyers need to take.

data.title: Wraithwatch, a veteran-founded AI cyber defense company, wins $30M federal contract to deploy its platform across multiple agencies.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 20, 2026, Wraithwatch, an AI cyber defense firm established by veterans from JSOC, Palantir, SpaceX, and Anduril, has secured a significant contract worth $30 million. The contract involves the deployment of their advanced cyber defense platform to various federal agencies with significant importance.

data.title: C3is Inc. shares (NASDAQ: CISS) dipped after reporting Q4 results; Loss per share narrowed to $4.86, adjusted net income doubled to $2.7 million. Voyage revenues rose to $10.6 million, average daily TCE increased by 24%, and fleet operational utilization improved to 93.5%. Company ended year with $14.9 million in cash.
data.description: C3is Inc. (NASDAQ: CISS) saw a decrease in shares on Friday following the release of its fourth-quarter and full-year financial results. The company reported an adjusted loss per share of $4.86, a significant improvement from the $24.90 loss per share reported in the same quarter last year. Adjusted net income more than doubled to $2.7 million from $1.1 million in the previous year's quarter. Voyage revenues rose from $9.4 million to $10.6 million, driven by higher average TCE rates and a reduction in idle days. Average daily TCE saw a 24% increase. Fleet operational utilization stood at 93.5%, an improvement from the prior year's 90.2% due to fewer idle days. Despite repaying debts, C3 maintained a strong liquidity position, ending the year with $14.9 million in cash.

data.title: Palm oil market set to reach $105.15B by 2032, with 4.47% CAGR growth from $77.42B in 2025. Structural transformation noted.
data.description: In Pune, India, as of February 20, 2026, the Palm Oil Market between 2025 and 2032 indicates a significant shift in supply chains, downstream processing, and sustainability standards. Starting with a value of US$ 77.42 billion in 2025, the market is expected to grow to US$ 105.15 billion.

data.title: AdventHealth Tampa renames center for medical education after Glazer family's multi-million-dollar gift for future physicians.
data.description: Recently in Tampa, Florida, AdventHealth Tampa celebrated a significant event following a generous multi-million-dollar donation from the Glazer family. The importance of graduate medical education was highlighted, emphasizing its role in providing communities with well-trained physicians. The event took place on February 20, 2026, showcasing the pivotal role that AdventHealth Tampa plays in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Virgin Music Group acquires Downtown Music; Pieter van Rijn named COO of VMG LA and Amsterdam.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, in Los Angeles and Amsterdam, Virgin Music Group (VMG) appointed Pieter van Rijn as the Chief Operating Officer. The company successfully finalized the acquisition of Downtown Music Holdings LLC (Downtown), a move that signifies a major step towards VMG's global expansion. This acquisition cements VMG's position in the music industry.
